content:
# LUT Algorithm Bug: Gain Normalization Suppresses Red Channel
## What
`compute_correction_params()` in `00_generate_lut.py` normalized gain to max=1.0, setting the strongest channel (blue underwater) to 1.0 and pushing red to ~0.5. With red boost capped at 30%, effective red gain was only 0.57.
## Fix (applied in issue #3)
Removed normalization. Clip to [0.5, 1.5] range instead. Increased red boost from 0.3 to 0.8. Tightened per-channel gamma from [0.5, 2.0] to [0.7, 1.3].
## Why it matters
Any normalization-to-max approach suppresses the weakest channel in color-imbalanced footage. For underwater, always expect red to be weakest.
